name: react-projects
description: A collection of small React projects — each one lives in its own folder with its own package.json. Run a project from its folder, or use the helper scripts below from here.

scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('
Root commands:
  npm run dev        -> ALL 8 projects on one page (gallery)  http://localhost:4173/

Single project (live reload):
  npm run dev:accordion         npm run dev:load-more
  npm run dev:color-generator   npm run dev:recursive-menu
  npm run dev:star-rating       npm run dev:weather-app
  npm run dev:image-slider      npm run dev:food-recipe
')"
scripts.dev:accordion: cd accordion && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:color-generator: cd color-generator && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:star-rating: cd star-rating && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:image-slider: cd image-slider && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:load-more: cd load-more && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:recursive-menu: cd recursive-menu && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:weather-app: cd weather-app && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:food-recipe: cd food-recipe && npm install && npm run dev
